$schema: This is descriptive research evidence, not normative doctrine
note: Consolidated sources from comprehensive cinema color research corpus with 60+ references.

sources.title: Global Film Color
sources.relevance: Emphasizes materiality of film stock and technical realities as fundamental to aesthetic result
sources.description: Contemporary scholarship on film color emphasizing technical and material aspects

sources.title: The Colour Fantastic
sources.relevance: Technical realities of film stock - unstable dyes, vibrancy, pixel depth
sources.description: Analysis of color technology and its aesthetic implications

sources.title: Technicolor Process Technical Documentation
sources.relevance: Three-strip Technicolor process, beam-splitting cameras, dye-transfer printing
sources.description: Technical specifications and historical documentation of Technicolor system

sources.title: Digital Intermediate Process History
sources.relevance: First complete DI on O Brother Where Art Thou, revolution in color control
sources.description: Documentation of Digital Intermediate development and impact

sources.title: Robert Richardson ASC Interviews and Documentation
sources.author: Robert Richardson
sources.relevance: Historical film stock emulation, colorist as creative collaborator
sources.description: Interviews and technical papers on Richardson's approach to color

sources.title: Bradford Young on Lighting Black Skin
sources.author: Bradford Young
sources.relevance: Subtractive lighting, challenging industry standards, representation in cinematography
sources.description: Interviews and articles on Young's approach to lighting and representation

sources.title: Vittorio Storaro Color Philosophy Documentation
sources.author: Vittorio Storaro
sources.relevance: Writing with light, color as psychological language, symbolic color meaning
sources.description: Storaro's philosophical approach to color and cinematography

sources.title: Christopher Doyle: Filming in the Neon World
sources.author: Christopher Doyle
sources.relevance: Neon city aesthetics, available light, atmospheric color
sources.description: Documentation of Doyle's approach to urban and neon cinematography

sources.title: Roger Deakins Philosophy and Technical Interviews
sources.author: Roger Deakins
sources.relevance: Justified stylization, digital intermediate mastery, naturalistic approach
sources.description: Interviews on Deakins' cinematographic philosophy and techniques

sources.title: Darius Khondji Cinematography Analysis
sources.author: ASC Documentation
sources.relevance: Atmospheric darkness, underexposure aesthetics, chemical processes
sources.description: Technical analysis of Khondji's distinctive cinematographic approach

sources.title: Fifth Generation Chinese Cinema Color Analysis
sources.relevance: Bold color symbolism, cultural exploration through color, Zhang Yimou
sources.description: Academic analysis of color use in Fifth Generation Chinese filmmakers

sources.title: Wong Kar-wai Color and Atmosphere Studies
sources.relevance: Neon city aesthetic, urban alienation, atmospheric color
sources.description: Analysis of Wong Kar-wai's distinctive color approaches

sources.title: Bollywood Color Theory and Practice
sources.relevance: Maximalist color, emotional intensity, cultural color meanings
sources.description: Analysis of color use in Bollywood cinema traditions

sources.title: Anurag Kashyap Color Symbolism Analysis
sources.relevance: Systematic color coding, guerilla aesthetics, social commentary
sources.description: Analysis of Kashyap's systematic approach to color in Indian cinema

sources.title: French New Wave Color Analysis
sources.relevance: Pop-art color use, anti-realistic aesthetics, Godard
sources.description: Analysis of color approaches in French New Wave cinema

sources.title: Italian Giallo Color Documentation
sources.relevance: Heavily gelled lighting, surreal color schemes, horror aesthetics
sources.description: Analysis of color use in Italian Giallo horror films

sources.title: Studio Ghibli Color Analysis
sources.relevance: Ecological color coding, systematic color meaning, Miyazaki
sources.description: Analysis of color approaches in Studio Ghibli animation

sources.title: Digital Color Grading Technology Documentation
sources.relevance: Post-production color control, creative possibilities, homogenization concerns
sources.description: Technical and cultural analysis of digital color grading impact

sources.title: Eastmancolor History and Preservation Crisis
sources.relevance: Color democratization, archival problems, magenta shift
sources.description: Historical analysis of Eastmancolor impact and preservation challenges

sources.title: ENR Bleach Bypass Process Documentation
sources.relevance: Desaturated aesthetics, enhanced contrast, 1990s influence
sources.description: Technical documentation of bleach bypass process and aesthetic impact

sources.title: Early Cinema Color History - Tinting and Toning
sources.relevance: Foundational color semiotics, pre-realistic color practices
sources.description: Historical analysis of early cinema color techniques and meanings

sources.title: Contemporary Neon Noir Analysis
sources.relevance: Toxic neon aesthetics, digital age alienation, LED lighting
sources.description: Analysis of contemporary neon noir aesthetic and cultural meaning

sources.title: HDR Technology Documentation and Criticism
sources.relevance: Extended dynamic range, contemporary debates, adoption challenges
sources.description: Technical documentation and critical analysis of HDR in cinema

sources.title: LED Lighting in Contemporary Cinematography
sources.relevance: Color control, energy efficiency, contemporary aesthetics
sources.description: Analysis of LED lighting impact on contemporary cinematography

sources.title: Film Stock Comparison Studies
sources.relevance: Kodak vs. Fuji characteristics, aesthetic differences, regional preferences
sources.description: Comparative analysis of different film stock aesthetics and characteristics

sources.title: Post-Colonial Cinema Color Analysis
sources.relevance: Decolonial color practices, challenging Western aesthetics
sources.description: Analysis of color use in post-colonial cinema contexts

sources.title: Representation in Cinematography Studies
sources.relevance: Skin tone politics, technical bias, corrective approaches
sources.description: Academic analysis of representation issues in cinematographic practice

sources.title: Cross-Cultural Color Studies in Cinema
sources.relevance: Cultural color meanings, avoiding universal interpretations
sources.description: Analysis of color meaning variations across different cultural contexts

sources.title: Gender and Color in Cinema Analysis
sources.relevance: Gender color associations, challenging traditional binaries
sources.description: Analysis of gender representation through color in cinema

sources.title: Film Technology Economics and Access
sources.relevance: Color technology democratization, access disparities, independent cinema
sources.description: Analysis of economic factors affecting color technology access

sources.title: Monochrome in Color Era Analysis
sources.relevance: Artistic choice, formal experimentation, historical dialogue
sources.description: Analysis of black-and-white choices in color film era

sources.title: Urban vs. Rural Cinematography Studies
sources.relevance: Environmental color approaches, artificial vs. natural lighting
sources.description: Analysis of color approaches in urban vs. rural cinematic environments

sources.title: Genre Color Conventions Analysis
sources.relevance: Established color associations, convention subversion
sources.description: Analysis of color conventions across film genres and their evolution

sources.title: Temporal Cinema Color Analysis
sources.relevance: Color as time marker, memory visualization, narrative structure
sources.description: Analysis of color use for temporal and memory representation

sources.title: Class and Cinema Color Analysis
sources.relevance: Color as class marker, production value, social hierarchies
sources.description: Analysis of color use in representing social class and power dynamics

sources.title: Artificial vs. Natural Color Aesthetics
sources.relevance: Technology impact, spectacle vs. realism, cultural meanings
sources.description: Analysis of artificial vs. natural color approaches and cultural implications

sources.title: Color Psychology in Cinema
sources.relevance: Emotional color associations, context dependency, cultural variation
sources.description: Analysis of psychological aspects of color use in cinema

sources.title: Animation Color Theory
sources.relevance: Systematic color coding, narrative function, artistic control
sources.description: Analysis of color approaches specific to animated cinema

sources.title: Independent Cinema Color Innovation
sources.relevance: Budget constraints, creative solutions, alternative aesthetics
sources.description: Analysis of color innovation in independent cinema contexts

sources.title: Global Cinema Color Access Analysis
sources.relevance: Technology disparities, cultural approaches, regional differences
sources.description: Analysis of global disparities and approaches in cinema color

source_categories.technical_documentation: Technical specifications, process documentation, equipment analysis
source_categories.academic_analysis: Scholarly analysis of color use, cultural meaning, aesthetic approaches
source_categories.interview: Primary source interviews with cinematographers, directors, and practitioners
source_categories.historical_analysis: Historical development of color technology and aesthetics
source_categories.genre_analysis: Analysis of color use within specific film genres
source_categories.cultural_analysis: Cross-cultural and representation studies of color in cinema
source_categories.aesthetic_analysis: Analysis of aesthetic choices and artistic approaches to color
source_categories.economic_analysis: Economic factors affecting color technology access and use

extraction_notes.methodology: Sources consolidated from comprehensive corpus document with 60+ references
extraction_notes.scope: Represents major academic, technical, and industry sources on cinema color
extraction_notes.limitations: Source quality and availability varies; some sources may be more accessible than others
extraction_notes.cultural_representation: Attempts to include diverse cultural perspectives while acknowledging Western academic bias
